name: wear_armor
description: Equip armor from the specified inventory slot
parameters: z.object({ slot: z.number().int().describe("The inventory slot index of the armor item to equip (e.g., 39 for a chestplate in initial survival inventory)"), destination: z.enum(["head", "torso", "legs", "feet"]).optional().describe("Specific armor slot to use. If omitted, the bot will attempt to infer it from the item name.") })

name: eat_bread
description: Consume bread to restore health and saturation
parameters: z.object({ count: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(1).describe("Maximum number of bread pieces to consume."), stopIfFull: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to stop eating once the food bar reaches 20.") })
